nodes.name: Large-billed gerygone
nodes.summary: The large-billed gerygone (Gerygone magnirostris) is a species of bird in the family Acanthizidae found in northern Australia and New Guinea. Taxonomy Gerygone magnirostris includes the following subspecies: G. m. conspicillata - (Gray, GR, 1859) G. m. affinis - Meyer, AB, 1874 G. m. rosseliana - Hartert, 1899 G. m. brunneipectus - (Sharpe, 1879) G. m. magnirostris - Gould, 1843 G. m. cairnsensis - Mathews, 1912 References Venables B., Pritchard J. and Murphy S. (2007) Novel observations of pre-breeding display structures used by Large-billed Gerygones. Sunbird 37: 30.
